tools.name: memory_search
tools.description: Performs semantic vector search across a user's persistent 3D memory space. Accepts a natural language query and returns ranked memory nodes with similarity scores.

tools.name: agent_spawn
tools.description: Spawns a new specialized AI agent from the Heady™ agent registry. Accepts archetype, task description, and resource budget. Returns an agent session ID for tracking.

tools.name: embed_text
tools.description: Generates high-dimensional vector embeddings for input text using the Heady™ embedding model. Supports batching up to 100 items per request.

tools.name: csl_gate
tools.description: Routes a task through the Cognitive Swarm Logic (CSL) gate — the φ-scaled decision layer that selects the optimal agent, archetype, and execution path for a given input.

tools.name: phi_scale
tools.description: Applies φ-scaling (golden ratio normalization) to numerical parameters such as rate limits, memory allocations, or scoring thresholds. Returns the scaled value and φ-ratio metadata.

tools.name: chat_complete
tools.description: Sends a message to the Heady™ chat pipeline with full context injection from vector memory. Supports streaming via SSE transport. Compatible with OpenAI chat format.

tools.name: tool_execute
tools.description: Meta-tool for executing any registered MCP tool by name with arbitrary parameters. Used by orchestration layers to dynamically dispatch tools without hardcoded references.

tools.name: bee_spawn
tools.description: Spawns a specialized bee worker from the 17-Swarm Matrix. Each bee type handles a distinct computational role. Accepts bee type ID and task payload, returns worker session reference.

tools.name: pipeline_run
tools.description: Executes a named Heady™ pipeline — a composed sequence of tools, agents, and transformations defined in the pipeline registry. Returns a run ID for status polling.

tools.name: vector_upsert
tools.description: Inserts or updates vector embeddings in the pgvector store with associated metadata. Supports namespace isolation, TTL, and custom dimension configurations.

tools.name: health_check
tools.description: Returns the current health status of all Heady™ services — API gateway, MCP server, vector store, Redis cache, and agent runtime. Includes response times and error rates.

tools.name: auth_validate
tools.description: Validates an API key or OAuth token against the Heady™ auth service. Returns token claims, scopes, rate limit status, and remaining quota for the authenticated identity.

tools.name: task_dispatch
tools.description: Dispatches an asynchronous task to the Heady™ task queue with priority, deadline, and dependency specifications. Returns a task ID for status tracking and result retrieval.

tools.name: swarm_coordinate
tools.description: Sends a coordination message to an active swarm cluster — reassigning bees, adjusting priorities, or injecting new task payloads into a running swarm. Used for dynamic swarm management.

tools.name: budget_track
tools.description: Records and validates API consumption against a user or organization's budget allocation. Enforces φ-scaled spending limits and returns current usage, remaining budget, and reset schedules.
